name: greenhouse-hiring-signals
description: Read public Greenhouse job boards and convert open roles into hiring-intent account signals.
business_value: Sales trigger detection, recruiting target discovery, and account growth monitoring.

inputs.name: board_token
inputs.note: Greenhouse board token, often visible in careers URLs.

auth.note: Public Job Board API data does not require auth.

pagination.note: The public board returns current published jobs.

verification_result: Example fixture validates hiring signal rows with department, location, and trigger tags.
known_risks: Only companies using public Greenhouse boards are covered.
Board token discovery may require one browser lookup.
Job descriptions should be summarized before importing into CRM notes.
